Conduct post-briefing discussions with detachment members to confirm understanding of key points from operational briefings

This learning point develops the practical ability to ensure all detachment members attend the required briefings e.g. situational awareness..

Conditions: An RSOI programme. An installation. Detachment personnel. Theatre specific equipment. Operational briefings. Land Mounting Instruction. Information from: Operational Order. Theatre SOPs. Unit SOIs/SOPs. AESPs. Local equipment schedules. All relevant support publications and user handbooks.

Standard to achieve: 1-3. A, AW, AX, AY, AZ.

Assessment: Performance assessment against stated standard
